description: Cloak threaded with moth's wing, allowing the wearer to dash forward.
how_to_get: Defeat Hornet Protector in Greenpath.

description: Cloak formed from the substance of the Abyss. Allows the wearer to dash through enemies and their attacks.
how_to_get: Located in the Abyss to the far east, beyond the sea of Void. Activate the lighthouse to suppress the Void Tendrils, then stand in the Void fountain bowl.

description: Crystal mechanism that allows the bearer to fly forward at dangerous speeds.
how_to_get: Found at the far end of Crystal Peak.

description: Wings of ethereal matter that allow the bearer to jump again in mid-air.
how_to_get: Defeat Broken Vessel in the Ancient Basin.

description: Claw-shaped device that allows the bearer to cling to walls and jump off them.
how_to_get: Found in the Mantis Village in Fungal Wastes.

description: Fruit formed from Isma's body. Grants the bearer protection from acid.
how_to_get: Found in Isma's Grove in the Royal Waterways.

description: A sacred weapon and tool to cut through the veil between dreams and waking.
how_to_get: Given by the Moth tribe Seer in the Resting Grounds.

description: Upgraded Dream Nail that can open the path to the Radiance.
how_to_get: Upgrade the Dream Nail by collecting 1800 Essence and visiting the Seer.

description: Place a gate that can be warped to from anywhere.
how_to_get: Reward from Seer after collecting 900 Essence.

description: A focused blast of SOUL that damages enemies.
how_to_get: Obtained from the Snail Shaman in the Forgotten Crossroads.

description: Upgraded Vengeful Spirit. A shadow-enhanced blast that pierces through enemies.
how_to_get: Obtained from the Snail Shaman's shrine in the Soul Sanctum.

description: A downward strike using SOUL to slam into the ground.
how_to_get: Defeat Soul Master in the City of Tears.

description: Upgraded Desolate Dive. A devastating slam with shadow energy.
how_to_get: Found in the Crystallised Mound in Crystal Peak.

description: Releases a scream of SOUL upward, damaging enemies above.
how_to_get: Found in the Fog Canyon, past Overgrown Mound.

description: Upgraded Howling Wraiths. A devastating upward howl from the Abyss.
how_to_get: Found in The Abyss, requires Howling Wraiths.

description: A nail art that unleashes a spinning slash.
how_to_get: Taught by Nailmaster Mato on the Howling Cliffs.

description: A nail art combining dash and slash for a powerful forward strike.
how_to_get: Taught by Nailmaster Oro in Kingdom's Edge (requires 800 Geo).

description: A nail art performing a powerful overhead strike.
how_to_get: Taught by Nailmaster Sheo in Greenpath.

description: Crystal lantern containing a Lumafly. Illuminates dark areas.
how_to_get: Purchase from Sly for 1800 Geo.

description: A pass that allows the use of the tram system.
how_to_get: Found in Deepnest near the Failed Tramway.

description: A quill that allows the bearer to map new areas.
how_to_get: Purchase from Iselda in Dirtmouth for 120 Geo.

description: The crest of the City of Tears, used to open the city gate.
how_to_get: Dropped by the False Knight in the Forgotten Crossroads.

description: A key shaped like a heart, opens the Tower of Love.
how_to_get: Found on a corpse in the southeast of the Queen's Gardens, above the path to Fungal Wastes.

description: A simple key that fits a variety of locks. Each key can only be used once. There are 4 in the game.
how_to_get: 1) Purchase from Sly in Dirtmouth for 950 Geo. 2) Found in the City of Tears in the room with Winged Sentries. 3) Found in the Ancient Basin inside a Mawlurk corpse. 4) Dropped by the Pale Lurker behind the Colosseum of Fools.

description: Key to unlock Sly's storeroom, expanding his inventory.
how_to_get: Found in Crystal Peak.

description: An ornate key used to open the door in the Soul Sanctum.
how_to_get: Purchase from Sly for 800 Geo (after obtaining the Shopkeeper's Key).

description: The mark of the King of Hallownest, opening the path to the Abyss.
how_to_get: Found in the Cast-Off Shell in Kingdom's Edge.

description: A strange device used to tune into Godhome.
how_to_get: Found in the Junk Pit in the Royal Waterways.

description: A mark from the Hunter, proving completion of the Journal.
how_to_get: Given by the Hunter in Greenpath after completing the Hunter's Journal.

description: A map showing the locations of all remaining Grubs.
how_to_get: Found in the Tower of Love after defeating The Collector.
